preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Adjust appearance, chat, and voice input preferences.
preferences.languageDesc: Choose the display language. Takes effect immediately.
preferences.themeDesc: Light, dark, or follow system preference.
preferences.chatFontDesc: Sans-serif, serif, or monospace font for chat content.
preferences.chatFontSizeDesc: Adjust the text size in conversations.
preferences.closeToTrayDesc: Hide to system tray when closing the window; the app keeps running in the background. Reopen from the tray icon.
preferences.startInSystemTrayDesc: Start the app without showing the main window. It runs in the background and can be opened via the tray icon.
preferences.voiceAutoSendDesc: Automatically send the message after voice recognition. When text refinement is also enabled, it sends after the text is polished.
preferences.voiceRefineTextDesc: After recognition, use AI to clean up the text — removing filler words and hesitation to make it clearer and more formal.
preferences.skillsApiKeyDesc: Skills marketplace powered by SkillsMP. Search works without a key (anonymous quota is lower); adding a key increases your daily quota.

models.title: Model Settings
models.description: Manage model services and default routing model. Chat, teams, and title generation use these to switch providers and models.
models.emptyState: No model services yet. Click "Add Service" in the top right to start configuring.
models.deleteServiceDesc: The model service and its model configs will be removed. Agents using it will fall back to the default routing model. Are you sure?
models.defaultModelDesc: Agents without a locked model automatically use the service and model selected here. Changes apply to future calls immediately.
models.noModelHint: Please add a model service and model below first
models.name: Name
models.saveConnectionFailed: Failed to save model service connection:
models.saveModelsFailedRetry: Failed to save model list. Please retry.
models.noRemoteModels: The API returned no models. Add one manually.
models.fetchFailed: Fetch failed: {{message}}. Please check Base URL and API Key.
models.addModelPlaceholder: Enter a model name, e.g. deepseek-chat
models.noModels: No models yet. Enter one manually or click "Fetch from Cloud".

audio.title: Audio Settings
audio.description: Configure Text-to-Speech (TTS) and Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR).
audio.ttsStandardDesc: Choose the API standard for TTS
audio.asrStandardDesc: Choose the API standard for ASR

standards.chat: Chat API (/chat/completions), with broader model and style control

audio.language: Language (optional, e.g. zh/en; leave blank for auto-detect)

image.title: Image Mode
image.description: Choose the API standard for image generation and configure the model.
image.standardDesc: Choose the API standard for image generation.
image.saveImageFailed: Failed to save image mode config
image.geminiBaseUrl: Base URL (optional; leave blank to use the official endpoint)

standards.openai-images: Compatible with mainstream image generation models. AI chooses aspect ratio and resolution automatically, and image editing is supported.
standards.openai-chat: Generate images through multimodal chat. AI adapts generation parameters automatically; image editing is not supported.
standards.gemini: Supports the latest Gemini image mode. AI chooses aspect ratio and resolution automatically, and image editing is supported.

webSearch.title: Web Search
webSearch.description: Configure web search services for AI to access real-time information.
webSearch.providerDesc: Choose a search provider for AI to perform web searches.
webSearch.contentOptionsNote: Note: enabling these options returns more content and consumes more tokens.
webSearch.signupQuota1000: to sign up and get an API Key. Free accounts include 1,000 searches per month.
webSearch.signupQuota2500: to sign up and get an API Key. Free accounts include 2,500 searches per month.
webSearch.signupQuota2000: to sign up and get an API Key. Free accounts include 2,000 searches per month.
webSearch.tavilyDesc: Visit {{site}} to sign up and get an API Key. Free accounts include 1,000 searches per month.
webSearch.includeDomainsHint: Only search these domains, separated by commas.
webSearch.excludeDomainsHint: Exclude these domains, separated by commas.
webSearch.exaDesc: Visit {{site}} to sign up and get an API Key. Free accounts include 1,000 searches per month.
webSearch.serperDesc: Visit {{site}} to sign up and get an API Key. Free accounts include 2,500 searches per month.
webSearch.searxngDesc: SearXNG is an open-source metasearch engine that does not require an API Key. Use public instances or your own service. Leave blank to use built-in defaults.
webSearch.instancesHint: One instance URL per line, or separate them with commas. Leave blank to use default instances.
webSearch.braveDesc: Visit {{site}} to sign up and get an API Key. Free accounts include 2,000 searches per month.

knowledge.title: Embedding Config
knowledge.description: Configure an OpenAI-compatible embeddings API for knowledge base vectorization and retrieval
knowledge.topK: TopK (number of similar chunks per retrieval)
knowledge.threshold: Similarity Threshold (results below this value are filtered)

memory.title: Global Memory
memory.description: Manage the long-term user preferences, profile facts, corrections, and project context PolarAgent remembers.
memory.enabledDesc: Allow AI to use memory tools to search and manage long-term memories.
memory.autoWriteDesc: Extract useful long-term memories after each completed response.
memory.autoWriteTokenThresholdDesc: Auto memory extraction triggers when cumulative conversation tokens reach this value. Set to 0 to trigger on every message.
memory.projectMemoryDesc: Keep memories from sessions with a working directory scoped to that project.
memory.thresholdDesc: Memories below this score are not returned.
memory.embeddingMissing: Memory reuses the embedding config. Please configure a working embeddings API in Embedding first.
memory.managementDesc: View, search, edit, disable, or delete saved long-term memories.
memory.enabledMemoryDesc: When disabled, tools will not retrieve this memory.
memory.disabledMemoryHint: Saving content regenerates the index. Disabling only affects retrieval and does not delete the original memory.
memory.deleteMessage: Permanently delete this memory? This cannot be undone.

data.title: Data Management
data.description: Manage the local data directory for the app.
data.dataDirectoryDesc: App configs, agents, skills, and sessions are stored here.

browserUse.description: Control real browser sessions through the built-in Chrome extension while preserving login state and cookies.
browserUse.saved: Browser Use settings have been saved and applied.
browserUse.websocketPortDesc: Local port used by the extension to connect to PolarAgent.
browserUse.actionTimeoutDesc: Maximum time to wait for the extension response for a single browser action.
browserUse.waitAfterActionDesc: Wait after clicking or filling so page microtasks, animations, and navigation can start.
browserUse.installDesc: The extension helps control real browser sessions. Export it first, then load it manually in Chrome.
browserUse.step1: 1. Click "Export Extension to Folder" and choose a save location.
browserUse.step3: 3. Enable "Developer mode" in the top right.
browserUse.step6: 6. After installation, open any web page to use it.

computerUse.description: Control desktop apps through Windows UI Automation. Defaults affect the observation scope and input behavior of AI tool calls.
computerUse.saved: Computer Use default behavior has been saved.
computerUse.defaultDepthDesc: Higher values are more complete and slower. 4-6 is recommended for regular windows.
computerUse.includeScreenshotDesc: When off, windows_snapshot is faster, but the model loses visual context.
computerUse.restoreClipboardDesc: Text input temporarily uses the clipboard. Keeping this enabled is recommended.
computerUse.actionTimeoutDesc: Maximum execution time for a single desktop action.

about.title: About
about.description: Version and application info for PolarAgent.
about.appDescription: A local-first AI Agent desktop app supporting conversations, team collaboration, skills, and tool extensions.
